# Next Steps — 2026-04-29 — Custom Labels Supplemental Feed Upload

**Status:** Cowork session cleared Blockers 1, 2, half of 3. Custom Labels supplemental feed CSV generated by main session. **Browser upload + propagation wait + your 2 personal actions remain.**

| Diagnosed 4/27 audit's wrong premise on Blocker 3 (labels are tags, not metafields) | ✅ Verified all 7,142 active products have correct price_tier + category tags |

## What's left

### Action 1 — Upload supplemental feed CSV (browser, ~5 min)

Open Merchant Center → account `5296797260` (8-Bit Legacy) → **Data sources** (left nav) → **Add data source** → **Add supplemental data source**.

- **Name:** `Custom Labels Supplemental`
- **Linked primary data source:** Feed B = `USD_88038604834` (the Shopify channel feed)
- **Country:** match Feed B's setting
- **File upload:** `data/merchant-center-custom-labels.csv` (735 KB, 13,254 rows, columns: `id, custom_label_0, custom_label_2`)
- **Schedule:** Daily (or weekly is fine — labels rarely change)
- **Save**

After upload, MC will validate the file. Expect ~13,254 matched rows. If MC reports a mismatch (e.g. <50% rows matched), the offer ID prefix `shopify_ZZ_` is wrong — stop and flag, main session will regenerate with the correct prefix.

### Action 2 — Reactivate Google Ads billing (you only, ~2 min)

`ads.google.com` → account `822-210-2291` → **Billing** → make payment to clear "Account paused" banner.

### Action 3 — Place real test order (you only, ~3 min)

8bitlegacy.com — pick any $10–20 product, real card, real address. **DO NOT cancel it.**

If you want to refund, do it through Merchant Center (Returns) AFTER the Purchase pixel attribution has landed in Google Ads (4–6h post-order). Cancelling via Shopify caused the #1071 cancellation race that killed pixel attribution last time.

### Action 4 — Wait for two propagations

| Pipeline | Time | Verify by |
|---|---|---|
| Pixel Purchase event lands | 4–6h post-order | Google Ads → Tools → Conversions → "Google Shopping App Purchase" → Webpages tab shows checkout URL |
| MC reprocesses supplemental labels | 4–24h post-upload | MC → click any $50+ game → custom_label_0 = `over_50`, custom_label_2 = `game` |

**Both must be green before flipping** — pixel attribution proves ROI tracking works; custom labels in MC mean the campaign listing tree can actually bid on the right products. Without either, the campaign either won't serve (no labels = excluded by listing tree) or won't be measurable (no pixel = no conversion data).

### Action 5 — Flip command

When pixel + labels are both verified, give me the explicit "flip" command and I'll enable campaign `8BL-Shopping-Games` (ID `23766662629`) via Google Ads API.

## Realistic timeline

| ETA | Event |
|---|---|
| Now (10:30 AM ET) | You: upload supplemental CSV + reactivate billing + place test order |
| ~3:00 PM ET | Pixel attribution should land |
| ~6:00 PM ET (best case) | Custom labels visible in MC |
| Tomorrow morning (worst case) | Custom labels visible in MC |
| Tonight or tomorrow morning | Flip ready |

"Today" launch is still possible if MC reprocesses fast (4–6h). If it goes 12+ hours, it's first-thing tomorrow. Either way, all the pre-work is done.

## Faith level

**70% positive ROI on launch** (up from 65%). The Limited mystery resolving cleanly is a real lift; the only outstanding unknowns are pixel attribution working end-to-end and MC actually honoring the supplemental custom labels at serve time.

## Risk: offer ID prefix

The `shopify_ZZ_` prefix is based on the cowork agent's visual confirmation in MC during the 2026-04-29 session. If MC's supplemental feed validation reports a low match rate, we have the wrong prefix. The script supports `--prefix shopify_XX_` to regenerate with a different prefix. Most likely alternatives if ZZ is wrong: `shopify_US_` (the old Feed A prefix) or `shopify_USD_` (matches the feed name suffix).
